mode_of_action_summary: Single Super Phosphate provides phosphorus and sulphur essential for root development and plant growth. Phosphorus enhances energy transfer, root strength, and flowering, while sulphur supports protein synthesis and improves overall plant health.

active_ingredients.name: Phosphorus (P2O5)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Enhances root development, flowering, and energy transfer

active_ingredients.name: Sulphur (S)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports protein synthesis and enzyme activity

urdu: پتے گہرے سبز یا جامنی ہو جاتے ہیں
punjabi: پتے گہرے سبز یا جامنی ہو جاندے نیں
roman_urdu: pattay dark green ya purple ho jate hain

application_details.method: Apply directly to soil before planting
application_details.coverage: Mix well into soil for better root absorption

resistance_management.advantage: Improves soil fertility and root strength
resistance_management.advice: Use as base fertilizer in nutrient program

multilingual_description.english: Single super phosphate fertilizer for improving soil fertility and root development.
multilingual_description.urdu: سنگل سپر فاسفیٹ کھاد جو زمین کی زرخیزی اور جڑوں کی مضبوطی بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: سنگل سپر فاسفیٹ کھاد جو زمین دی زرخیزی تے جڑاں مضبوط کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Sooraj SSP fertilizer is a single super phosphate used to improve soil fertility root development and crop growth. It provides phosphorus and sulphur essential for plant development.
